label: Beggars
rules: Tax: gain 1 coin

label: Miners
rules: Whenever you Extract, gain 3 stone

label: Priests
rules:
Ranged/Melee - spend 1 charge per defense to ignore that many hits.
Lock: gain 1 charge per magic, up to 3. Store up to 6.

label: Lookout towers
rules:
Start of Battle - If adjacent to your outpost, you may move 1 unit (+1 if you have 3 tactic)  from the outpost to the Battlefield. Roll that many extra combat dice.
Any action: place 1 unit (+1 if you have 5 defense) in each of your outposts

label: Travelling Merchants
rules: Any action: gain 3 coins per wealth, up to 7

label: Farmers
rules: Extract: gain 1 food per commoner

label: Labourers
rules: When you Build, pay up to 2 resources (+1 per other mercenary) with coins instead. You can build 1 extra construction

label: Looters
rules:
1. In Battles, roll +1 melee die if you have another warrior 
2. When you kill one or more units, gain 1 coin

label: Vanguard
rules: Move: after all steps, move one extra step (even with units you already moved). Then take 1 resource per expansion from regions you control.

label: Dryads
rules: Any action: gain 1 wood, +2 if you have another magic

label: Acolytes
rules:
When your unit dies, gain 1 coin
Any action: you may sacrifice a unit to gain 2 food.

label: Workshops
rules: When you activate a commoner, gain 2 charges, store any number. Spend charges any time to gain that many resources

label: Raiders
rules: When you move, select one of the destination regions. If the region produces a resource, steal 1 of that resource (+1 if you have 4 warriors) from each opponent with a unit there.

label: Bane chanters
rules:
When you sacrifice a unit, gain 2 charges, store up to 6.
Lock: gain 1 charge
Melee/Ranged - you may spend charges to force opponents to reroll that many dice of your choice.

label: Shield wall
rules: Battle: Ranged/Melee - ignore the first hit of the Battle (2 hits instead if you have 3 defense). Gain +1 combat die per warrior, up to 3

label: Tax collectors
rules:
When you gain coins from another card's ability, gain +1 coin from the same source.
Tax: after income, steal 2 coins (+1 if you have 3 crime) from each opponent

label: Druids
rules: Any action: Select up to 1 forest you control per wilderderness. Pay 1 wood per selected forest to place 1 unit per shadow (up to 3) to each

label: Waystations
rules: Cleanup: Move 1 step per expansion

label: Volunteers
rules:
Aftermath - if you were the defender and at least one of your units was killed by opponents, place one unit in your homeland.
Any action: If you have nobility, place 2 units in your homeland.

label: Assassins
rules: Any action: Select a region with no more than 1 enemy unit (up to 2 units if you have 3 conspiracy). If you have 3 crime, you may pay 2 coins to convert them. Otherwise kill them.

label: Skirmishers
rules:
Melee - gain +1 melee die if you control 3 regions adjacent to the Battlefield
Battle: Start of Battle - move up to 2 units per tactic from the Battlefield to an adjacent region ignoring control

label: Alchemists
rules:
Battle: Ranged - Before combat rolls, sacrifice a unit on the Battlefield. Kill 2 enemy units there.
Any action: sell up to 1 resource per magic, each for 4 coins (+2 per other wealth)

label: Siege Engines
rules:
When you activate a retinue, gain 1 charge, store up to 6.
Start of Combat phase: for every two charges you spend, select a region adjacent to your units. For each region, roll 3 dice, +2 per other siege. On each 4+, kill 1 enemy unit.

label: Soul Shepherds
rules:
1. When you sacrifice units, place  them on this card.
2. When 2 or more your units die in Battle, sacrifice one of them, unless there are 3 units on this card 
Battle: units on this card participate in the Battle. If you have 4 defense, place them on the Battlefield

label: Illusionists
rules:
When you activate a crime, steal 2 coins from an opponent.
Battle: Ranged - opponent rolls 2 less dice (+1 per other magic)

label: Quartermasters
rules:
1. When you activate a retinue, gain 1 food and add 1 charge to another card
2. When you Move, you may spend up to 2 food per warrior to place that many units among the destination regions.

label: Trolls
rules:
When you Recruit, you may buy up to two additional units  per mercenary for 1 coin each. 
Battle: Melee - roll 2 extra melee dice, +1 per other wilderness

label: Archers
rules: Battle: Ranged - roll 2 dice per tactic. On each 3+, assign 1 hit

label: Vampires
rules:
Melee - if you deal at least 2 hits, ignore 1 hit assigned to you.
Battle: Melee - you may sacrifice up to 1 unit (+1 if you have 3 cultist) to roll +3 melee dice (+1 if you have 3 shadow) for each.

label: Pillagers
rules:
When you would steal coins but the target doesn't have enough, steal the rest in resources, then kill the rest in units in one region with your unit.
Battle: Melee - pay up to 1 coin per mercenary to gain +2 dice for each. Aftermath - steal 1 coin per unit you killed from the owners

label: Secret tunnels
rules:
When you activate a conspiracy, gain 1 resource. When you activate an expansion, gain 2 coins.
Battle: Start of Battle - move any number of units from homeland or from an adjacent region to the Battlefield ignoring control. Gain that many extra melee dice, up to 5

label: Local Levys
rules:
1. When you activate a tactic, move 1 step.
2. When you activate a commoner, place 1 unit in your homeland.

label: Trade routes
rules:
You may buy resources for 2 coins each.
Any action: gain 3 coins (+3 per other wealth) per expansion

label: Heralds of apocalypse
rules: When your last unit in a region dies, place 1 unit to your homeland (+1 if you have 3 cultists). If you have 3 conspiracy, place them in any village with your unit (other than the Battlefield) instead

label: Entertainers
rules:
When you Move, gain 7 coins
Cleanup: You may convert 1 enemy unit per crime for 5 coins each.

label: Knights
rules:
Your melee dice hit on 3+
Cleanup: up to once per warrior, spend 7 food. Move that many steps. If you do, you must Battle in each destination.

label: Stone giants
rules:
When you Recruit, you pay exactly 1 stone to buy 1 extra unit per wilderness. Place them in a mountain region you control.
Any action: destroy all enemy outposts in regions you control. Gain 2 wood for each.

label: Vigilante mob
rules: Any action: gain 1 unit per conspiracy. Place them in any village (you don't have to control it).

label: Royal mages
rules: Battle: Ranged - roll 3 dice (+1 per other magic). Each 3+ is a success. Select that many connected regions containing the Battlefield. Kill one unit in each.

label: Undead Horde
rules:
When you Recruit, gain 1 extra unit per shadow. 
Battle: Melee - you may discard a commoner from your frontline or reserve to place 2 (+1 per other mercenary) units on the Battlefield

label: Dragon Riders
rules:
Battle: Ranged - roll 5 dice (+4 per other siege). For each 3+, kill a unit
Move: ignore control.  One of the steps can be up to 2 regions distance, skipping the first region.

label: Wraiths
rules: Cleanup - Select three connected regions, all with your units or adjacent to them. Roll 3 dice, +1 per other shadow. Each 3+ is a hit in the first region. Apply any leftover hits to the second region, then to the third

label: Flying Castles
rules: Battle: Start of Battle - you may move your outposts to any other regions ignoring distance and control. Roll +2 melee dice per outpost on or adjacent to the Battlefield.

label: Werewolves
rules:
Aftermath: Gain 1 food (+1 if you have 5 warriors) per unit you killed. If you killed at least one, start a new Melee phase where you roll +1 die per wilderness.
Battle: Melee - roll +1 melee die per food

label: Demons
rules:
Sacrifice 7 units to buy this, minus the number of cultists. 
Any action: move one step from your homeland to any region
Battle: Start of Battle - move up to 1 enemy unit per cultist to an adjacent region. Roll 5 extra melee dice

label: Valkyries
rules:
Place your units killed by opponents in Battles on this card. 
Battle: Start of Battle - place 2 units per nobility on the Battlefield. Roll 1 extra melee die per nobility
Final Scoring - gain 1VP for every host on this card. A host is 12 units minus nobility

label: Shapeshifters
rules: Lock - choose two different tags for this card. No other card on your frontline can have the same combination.
